# Offline Agent Library

This folder is a local, offline library of custom VS Code Copilot agents for software development workflows.

## Team Agents

- `dev-team-lead.agent.md` - Plans scope, delegates implementation and verification, and consolidates outcomes.
- `implementation-engineer.agent.md` - Implements code changes with tests and minimal safe diffs.
- `qa-reviewer.agent.md` - Performs bug-focused review and validation checks.

## Usage

1. Open the Copilot agent picker and choose `Dev Team Lead` for end-to-end work.
2. The lead can delegate to specialized subagents for coding and QA.
3. Keep this library in source control to stay fully offline and reproducible.
